name: google-trends-mcp
description: Google Trends demand signals: interest over time, comparisons, related and trending queries
long_description: Gives Claude live access to Google Trends with no API key: interest over time, head-to-head term comparisons, rising and top related queries, daily trending searches, and regional interest breakdowns. Uses the unofficial endpoints the Trends website itself calls.

tools.name: interest_over_time
tools.description: Interest scores for up to 5 terms over a time range

tools.name: compare_terms
tools.description: Normalized comparison of 2-5 terms with winner analysis

tools.name: related_queries
tools.description: Rising and top related queries for a term

tools.name: trending_now
tools.description: Today's trending searches for a country

tools.name: interest_by_region
tools.description: Regional interest breakdown for a term
